overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rainy neon-lit Night City through elevated highways, underpasses, and dense commercial streets. The footage features heavy rain, cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards, and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway following traffic through heavy rain

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with green illuminated displays and steering wheel
rain-slicked black asphalt with white lane markings reflecting neon lights
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the left side of the elevated road
large holographic billboards displaying colorful advertisements and brand logos
concrete support pillars and overhead structure of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a heavy rainstorm at night, following a sedan through wet streets illuminated by neon billboards. The dashboard displays are visible in the foreground while red and white barriers line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with concrete pillars transitioning to street level

events.description: entering covered underpass from elevated highway, sky becomes obscured
turning right at intersection with large cola advertisement sign overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered underpass and executing right turn at intersection

entered.detail: massive square concrete pillars supporting the overhead bridge structure
solid concrete ceiling of the underpass with embedded lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large illuminated sign displaying 'COLA' in white letters against dark background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a covered underpass with massive concrete pillars, sheltering from the rain. The lighting shifts to artificial as the car continues through the tunnel-like structure before emerging to turn right at an intersection marked by a large cola advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with graffiti walls and curved ramps

events.description: making sharp left turn into narrower industrial street
passing from industrial area into commercial district with storefronts

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial streets making several turns past warehouses

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: multi-level parking garage with open concrete levels and yellow markings
large metal ventilation fans and industrial equipment on building exterior
vertical neon sign with 'WIDE OPEN' text in purple and white
colorful fabric awnings extending over sidewalk from storefronts

segments.scene_description: Driving through industrial streets with graffiti-covered walls and warehouse buildings, making several turns. The vehicle passes a 'WIDE OPEN' neon sign and transitions into a commercial area with storefront awnings while light rain continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: slowing down to navigate narrow commercial street with parked cars

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through narrow commercial streets avoiding pedestrians and obstacles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking along storefront sidewalk
person standing near illuminated shop entrance

entered.detail: ground-level shops with illuminated windows and signage lining both sides
various colorful neon signs in Japanese and English advertising businesses
zebra-striped pedestrian crossings with yellow and white markings
temporary yellow plastic barriers and construction signage

segments.scene_description: Navigating narrow commercial streets lined with illuminated storefronts and neon signs. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks, and the vehicle slows to maneuver around parked cars and construction barriers in the dense urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from an exposed, rain-slicked highway into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a commercial district. It begins on an elevated road during a heavy rainstorm, following a sedan past glowing billboards and red-and-white barriers with the vehicle's dashboard visible in the foreground. As the car descends into a covered underpass, the rain vanishes and the lighting shifts to a sterile, artificial glow among massive concrete pillars before the vehicle emerges to turn right at a large cola advertisement. The scene then shifts into an industrial zone characterized by graffiti-covered walls and warehouse buildings, passing a wide open neon sign as the light rain returns. Finally, the camera maneuvers through narrow commercial streets lined with illuminated storefronts and pedestrians with umbrellas, slowing down to navigate around parked cars and construction barriers.
